mapper.sql: id, processKey, taskKey, applyTime, beginTime, endTime, dueTime, procInstId, message, status, userId, objType, objId, dataType, dataId, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, orgId, customInfo
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_workflow (processKey, taskKey, applyTime, beginTime, endTime, dueTime, procInstId, message, status, userId, objType, objId, dataType, dataId, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, orgId, customInfo) values (#{processKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dueTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_workflow
processKey,
taskKey,
applyTime,
beginTime,
endTime,
dueTime,
procInstId,
message,
status,
userId,
objType,
objId,
dataType,
dataId,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
orgId,
customInfo,
#{processKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{dueTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
mapper.update:
update pm_workflow
processKey = #{processKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
taskKey = #{taskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applyTime = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
beginTime = #{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
endTime = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dueTime = #{dueTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
procInstId = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
message = #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
objType = #{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
objId = #{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dataType = #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dataId = #{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orgId = #{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(customInfo, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_workflow set processKey = #{processKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, taskKey = #{taskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, applyTime = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, beginTime = #{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, endTime = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dueTime = #{dueTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, procInstId = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, message = #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, objType = #{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, objId = #{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dataType = #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dataId = #{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, orgId = #{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(customInfo, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}) where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: ( wf.processKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.taskKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.procInstId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.message like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.objType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.dataType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from pm_workflow as wf
wf.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.processKey = #{processKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.taskKey = #{taskKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.applyTime = #{applyTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.beginTime = #{beginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.endTime = #{endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.dueTime = #{dueTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.procInstId = #{procInstId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.message = #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.userId = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.objType = #{objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.objId = #{objId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.dataType = #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.dataId = #{dataId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.orgId = #{orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND

select count(1) from pm_workflow as wf
wf.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.processKey = #{processKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.taskKey = #{taskKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.applyTime = #{applyTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.beginTime = #{beginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.endTime = #{endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.dueTime = #{dueTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.procInstId = #{procInstId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.message = #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.userId = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.objType = #{objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.objId = #{objId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.dataType = #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.dataId = #{dataId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.orgId = #{orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND

select * from pm_workflow as wf
wf.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.processKey = #{model.processKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.taskKey = #{model.taskKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.applyTime = #{model.applyTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.beginTime = #{model.beginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.endTime = #{model.endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.dueTime = #{model.dueTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.procInstId = #{model.procInstId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.message = #{model.message, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.userId = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.objType = #{model.objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.objId = #{model.objId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.dataType = #{model.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.dataId = #{model.dataId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.orgId = #{model.orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
( wf.processKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.taskKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.procInstId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.message like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.objType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.dataType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from pm_workflow as wf
wf.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.processKey = #{model.processKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.taskKey = #{model.taskKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.applyTime = #{model.applyTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.beginTime = #{model.beginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.endTime = #{model.endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.dueTime = #{model.dueTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

wf.message = #{model.message, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.userId = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.objType = #{model.objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.objId = #{model.objId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.dataType = #{model.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.dataId = #{model.dataId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wf.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
wf.orgId = #{model.orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wf.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
( wf.processKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.taskKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.procInstId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.message like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.objType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.dataType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wf.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
